MHARVEST.Settings.ShowPickupDialogHint: Show a take/leave dialog after harvesting. If disabled, all items go directly to inventory.
MHARVEST.Settings.AppraisalEnabledHint: Allow players to appraise a creature before harvesting to preview available materials.
MHARVEST.Settings.AppraisalDCOffsetHint: Modifier applied to harvest DC for appraisal checks. Default: -5 (appraisal is easier than harvesting).
MHARVEST.Settings.BaseDCOffsetHint: Added to creature CR to calculate the base harvest DC. Default: 10 (e.g., CR 5 creature = DC 15).
MHARVEST.Settings.CritFailEnabledHint: Enable critical failure consequences on Natural 1 harvest rolls (creature-specific effects like acid damage, disease, etc.).
MHARVEST.Settings.AllowHumanoidHarvestin: Allow harvesting humanoid creatures. Disabled by default for tables that prefer not to include this.
MHARVEST.Settings.ValueMultiplierHint: Global multiplier applied to all harvested item values. Use to adjust economy balance (e.g., 0.5 for half value, 2.0 for double).
MHARVEST.Settings.ForagingBaseDCHint: Default base DC for foraging checks when no environment-specific DC is set.
MHARVEST.Settings.SkillMappingMenuHint: Override which skill is used for harvesting each creature type. Defaults follow the distributed 6-skill system.
MHARVEST.Notification.AlreadyHarvested: This creature has already been harvested.
MHARVEST.Notification.HarvestRuined: The harvest has been ruined — no further attempts possible.
MHARVEST.Notification.SelectToken: Select your token first, then click a dead creature.
MHARVEST.Notification.NoTarget: Click a dead creature token to target it for harvesting.
MHARVEST.Notification.NoTable: No harvest table found for this creature.
MHARVEST.Notification.HumanoidDisabled: Humanoid harvesting is disabled in module settings.
MHARVEST.Notification.NoTool: You need appropriate tools to harvest this creature.
MHARVEST.Dialog.HowManyHours: How many hours will you spend foraging?
MHARVEST.Chat.ThreatReminder: Characters who forage cannot contribute to passive Perception checks for noticing threats.
MHARVEST.Panel.FailureEventsHint: Nat 1 = always triggers. Otherwise 1% per point missed. Check the box to force the next failure to trigger an event.
MHARVEST.FailureConfig.Title: Configure Failure Event
